_about: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for Cloudflare's Content-Syndication business definitions (campaign-ID filters, client-defined KR/RIG segments, geographic region map, market chips, lead-status buckets). BOTH sides read this file: (1) the CLIENT side loads the ID lists into client_cloudflare.seed_* tables (definitions_seed.py) which sql/10 + sql/14 read live; (2) the VERIFIER side (status_dashboard/job/main.py) builds its Snowflake check SQL from this same file. Editing here (via the platform Data Accuracy tab → 'Make this live') changes BOTH at once, no two-place edit. The repo copy is the version-controlled SEED; the LIVE copy lives at gs://bidbrain-analytics-status-dash/definitions/cloudflare.json.
_maintenance: Churny lists (campaign IDs, segment IDs, assets, buckets, market chips) are seed-driven end-to-end. The geographic country lists are also mirrored as literals inside sql/10's CASE (low-churn structural logic) — if you change geographic_regions here, also update the matching CASE arms in sql/10. Display-label CASEs (PUBLISHER/OFFER_TYPE/PUBLISHER_OFFER) stay as view literals and are out of scope.
last_edited_by: 2026-06-25 rework: 11 media-plan markets, KR=all-Korea, no OTHER residual

segments._note: Evaluated BEFORE the geographic_regions buckets: RIG first, then KR. RIG = the Modernize-Applications gaming asset on the 3 Final Funnel campaigns, non-Korea (~172, asset-based so it spans countries). KR (2026-06-25) = ALL Korea leads in the 12 CS campaigns (~200) — the old '6 original El* campaigns only' rule was dropped (it stranded ~36 Korea ABM leads in OTHER and contradicted the media-plan target of 202).

KR._note: Country-only since 2026-06-25 (no campaign_ids): every Korea lead in the 12 CS campaigns.

geographic_regions._note: Evaluated AFTER RIG/KR. COUNTRY_NAME → market map at the 2026 media-plan grain (2026-06-25 split: ANZ→AU/NZ, ASEAN→SIM/ROA, GCR→GCR-CN/TW/HK). Case-insensitive — sql/10 AND the status verifier apply UPPER(TRIM(COUNTRY_NAME)). Also mirrored as literals in sql/10's CASE.

status_buckets._note: Cloudflare's CS map (OPPOSITE of mongodb): Accepted = Accepted + Replied + Unresponsive. As of 2026-06-25 there is NO residual 'OTHER' bucket — every lead maps to one of the 11 markets, so all counts are complete by construction.
